raw: Discount: This pass provides 50% off regular admission to one household/immediate family only. (Weekdays only.) To use: This is an electronic pass that will be sent to your email. Please visit The Children's Piazza website (thechildrenspiazza.com) to make a reservation prior to your visit. Reservations are required for entry. Pass only valid on the date reserved. The email confirmation sent to you serves as your discount pass. Please present this pass (either printed or on your mobile device) upon entry to the Children's Piazza. Library staff may print this pass for you upon request. ATTENTION: Patrons must be at least 18 YEARS OF AGE to book discount passes. Reservations made using a child's card will be DENIED. Patron's must reserve passes using their own library card, do not change the name on your reservation. If another member of your household will be checking out your discount pass, you must contact the library in advance. If booking a pass with an e-card, patrons must also provide proof of address when they arrive at the library to pick-up their pass and will be switched over to a physical library card. Unwanted passes MUST BE CANCELLED. Failure to cancel an unwanted pass will result in a 30 day ban on reserving discount passes.
